description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image as the default runner image and includes the docker:dind service for Docker-in-Docker support. Define three stages named build, package, and deploy. Add a maven-build job in the build stage that overrides the image to maven:3-jdk-8 and executes the shell command mvn package. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are required, and the pipeline does not perform any deployment steps.
